headline: Jefferies Upgrades Dominion Energy to Buy, Raises Price Target to $76
summary: Jefferies  analyst Paul Zimbardo   upgrades Dominion Energy (NYSE:D) from Hold to Buy and raises the price target from $65 to $76.
